rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports.
Use implementation scopes for bindings that involve subcomponents or connections.
generic_rules: Ensure all AGREE identifiers are declared or visible in the AADL model.
Do not introduce package-qualified names or types not present in the input model.
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in component type contracts when concrete bounds are provided.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Constants and equations in AGREE should use valid AADL data types and port names.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes unless they are valid in that scope.
Do not assume numeric bounds for ports unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
